mapper.select:
SELECT a.write_year, -- 위험성평가 계획 a.doc_type, a.doc_no, CONCAT(a.plan_nm, ' (', h.orgn_nm, ')') as plan_nm, a.risk_assessment_standards, a.risk_allowance_standards, a.cpem_write_year, a.cpem_doc_no, a.orgn_id, b2.write_year as cpem_confirm_write_year, b2.doc_no as cpem_confirm_doc_no, b.confirm_yn, c.rev_no, coalesce(c.process_id, null) AS process_id, -- 공정 정보 c.process_nm, coalesce(e.prcs_work_id, 0) AS prcs_work_id, -- 작업 정보 e.prcs_cnfm_id, e.work_content, e.ord_seq, ( SELECT COUNT(doc_seq) FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation a WHERE a.prcs_work_id = e.prcs_work_id AND a.use_yn = 'Y' AND a.doc_no = #{docNo} AND a.write_year = #{writeYear} ) AS registerCount, -- 완료된 평가 건수 ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT rai.doc_seq) FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation rai LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction rair ON rair.write_year = rai.write_year AND rair.doc_type = rai.doc_type AND rair.doc_no = rai.doc_no AND rair.doc_seq = rai.doc_seq WHERE rai.prcs_work_id = e.prcs_work_id AND rai.use_yn = 'Y' AND rai.doc_no = #{docNo} AND rai.write_year = #{writeYear} AND ( -- 조건 1: rair가 모두 완료된 경우 EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction r2 WHERE r2.write_year = rai.write_year AND r2.doc_type = rai.doc_type AND r2.doc_no = rai.doc_no AND rai.use_yn = 'Y' AND r2.doc_seq = rai.doc_seq AND r2.write_year = #{writeYear} GROUP BY r2.doc_seq HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN r2.use_yn = 'Y' AND r2.completed_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = COUNT(r2.doc_seq) ) OR -- 조건 2: 기준 비교 ( rai.risk_score IS NOT NULL AND a.risk_allowance_standards IS NOT NULL AND SPLIT_PART(rai.risk_score, '_', 1) = SPLIT_PART(a.risk_allowance_standards, '_', 1) AND CASE SPLIT_PART(rai.risk_score, '_', 2) WHEN 'l' THEN 1 WHEN 'm' THEN 2 WHEN 'h' THEN 3 ELSE CAST(SPLIT_PART(rai.risk_score, '_', 2) AS INTEGER) END <= CASE SPLIT_PART(a.risk_allowance_standards, '_', 2) WHEN 'l' THEN 1 WHEN 'm' THEN 2 WHEN 'h' THEN 3 ELSE CAST(SPLIT_PART(a.risk_allowance_standards, '_', 2) AS INTEGER) END -- 추가 조건: 아직 완료되지 않은 항목이 하나라도 있으면 제외 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction r3 WHERE r3.write_year = rai.write_year AND r3.doc_type = rai.doc_type AND r3.doc_no = rai.doc_no AND r3.doc_seq = rai.doc_seq AND r3.completed_date IS NULL AND r3.use_yn = 'Y' ) ) ) ) AS completedCount FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds b ON b.comp_id = a.comp_id AND b.orgn_id = a.orgn_id AND b.use_yn = 'Y'
AND b.write_year = a.cpem_write_year AND b.doc_no = a.cpem_doc_no
AND b.confirm_yn = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds b2 ON b2.comp_id = a.comp_id AND b2.orgn_id = a.orgn_id AND b2.use_yn = 'Y' AND b2.confirm_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_analysis c ON c.write_year = b.write_year AND c.doc_type = b.doc_type AND c.doc_no = b.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_process_work_cnfm d ON d.rev_no = c.rev_no AND d.cnfm_yn = 'Y' AND d.process_id = c.process_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_process_work e ON e.prcs_cnfm_id = d.prcs_cnfm_id LEFT JOIN ESG.tb_classification_hazards f ON f.process_id = c.process_id AND f.write_year = #{writeYear} LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards_detail g ON g.write_year = f.write_year AND g.doc_type = f.doc_type AND g.doc_no = f.doc_no INNER JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info h ON h.orgn_id = a.orgn_id WHERE a.write_year = #{writeYear} AND a.doc_type = 'RAP' AND a.comp_id = #{compId} AND a.use_yn = 'Y'
AND a.doc_no = #{docNo}
ORDER BY a.plan_nm asc, c.process_nm asc, e.work_content asc

SELECT CASE WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_1' THEN '기계적 요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_2' THEN '전기적 요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_3' THEN '화학(물질)적 요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_4' THEN '생물학적요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_5' THEN '작업특성 요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_6' THEN '작업환경 요인' END AS hazards_title, a.hazards_type, 'RAP' AS doc_type, b.doc_no, b.doc_seq, i.class_nm as implementationNm, b.hazards_classification AS impl_hazards_classification, b.hazards_cause, b.hazards_factor, tlm.legal_id, tlm.legal_nm, b.related_evidence, b.use_yn AS impl_use_yn, coalesce(b.prcs_work_id, 0) AS prcs_work_id, b.frequency_score, b.impact_score, b.risk_score, b.after_frequency_score, b.after_impact_score, b.after_risk_score, b.current_safety_measures, b.created_at, -- 감소대책 정보 'RAP' as reduction_doc_type, f.doc_no, f.doc_seq, f.doc_seq_detail, f.reduction_measures, f.expected_date, f.completed_date, f.impl_content, f.use_yn AS reduction_use_yn, f.created_at AS redcution_created_at, -- 담당자 정보 g.doc_seq_detail2, g.hr_id, h.hr_nm, -- 감소대책 이미지 targetId j.file_id AS prevFileId, k.file_id AS afterFileId FROM ( SELECT hazards_type from esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation where write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = 'RAP' AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND prcs_work_id = #{prcsWorkId} UNION SELECT b.hazards_type FROM ESG.tb_classification_hazards a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards_detail b ON a.write_year = b.write_year AND a.doc_type = b.doc_type AND a.doc_no = b.doc_no WHERE a.use_yn = 'Y' AND a.process_id = #{processId} AND a.process_work_rev_no = #{revNo} AND a.comp_id = #{compId} AND a.write_year = #{writeYear} ) a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation b ON b.hazards_type = a.hazards_type AND write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = 'RAP' AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND prcs_work_id = #{prcsWorkId} LEFT JOIN esg.tb_legal_manage tlm ON b.legal_id = tlm.legal_id AND comp_id = #{compId} LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction f ON f.write_year = b.write_year AND f.doc_type = b.doc_type AND f.doc_no = b.doc_no AND f.doc_seq = b.doc_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction_hr g ON g.write_year = f.write_year AND g.doc_type = f.doc_type AND g.doc_no = f.doc_no AND g.doc_seq = f.doc_seq AND g.doc_seq_detail = f.doc_seq_detail LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info h ON h.hr_id = g.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards_factor_mgmt i ON i.factor_id = b.hazards_type AND i.class_id = b.hazards_classification LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file j ON j.target_type = 'RAP' AND j.target_id = CONCAT(f.write_year, f.doc_no, f.doc_seq, f.doc_seq_detail,'A') LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file k ON k.target_type = 'RAP' AND k.target_id = CONCAT(f.write_year, f.doc_no, f.doc_seq, f.doc_seq_detail,'B') ORDER BY a.hazards_type ASC, b.doc_seq ASC, f.doc_seq_detail ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_1' THEN '기계적 요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_2' THEN '전기적 요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_3' THEN '화학(물질)적 요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_4' THEN '생물학적요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_5' THEN '작업특성 요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_6' THEN '작업환경 요인' END AS hazards_title, a.hazards_type, 'RAP' AS doc_type, b.doc_no, b.doc_seq, b.process_id, o.process_nm, i.class_nm as implementationNm, b.hazards_classification AS impl_hazards_classification, b.hazards_cause, b.hazards_factor, tlm.legal_id, tlm.legal_nm, b.related_evidence, b.use_yn AS impl_use_yn, coalesce(b.prcs_work_id, 0) AS prcs_work_id, m.work_content, b.frequency_score, b.impact_score, b.risk_score, b.after_frequency_score, b.after_impact_score, b.after_risk_score, b.current_safety_measures, b.created_at, -- 감소대책 정보 'RAP' as reduction_doc_type, f.doc_no, f.doc_seq, f.doc_seq_detail, f.reduction_measures, f.expected_date, f.completed_date, f.impl_content, f.use_yn AS reduction_use_yn, f.created_at AS redcution_created_at, -- 담당자 정보 g.doc_seq_detail2, g.hr_id, h.hr_nm, -- 감소대책 이미지 targetId j.file_id AS prevFileId, k.file_id AS afterFileId FROM ( SELECT hazards_type from esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation where write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = 'RAP' AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND process_id in #{item} UNION SELECT b.hazards_type FROM ESG.tb_classification_hazards a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards_detail b ON a.write_year = b.write_year AND a.doc_type = b.doc_type AND a.doc_no = b.doc_no WHERE a.use_yn = 'Y' AND a.write_year = #{writeYear} AND a.process_id in #{item} AND a.process_work_rev_no = #{revNo} AND a.comp_id = #{compId} ) a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation b ON b.hazards_type = a.hazards_type AND write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = 'RAP' AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND b.use_yn = 'Y' AND process_id in #{item} LEFT JOIN esg.tb_legal_manage tlm ON b.legal_id = tlm.legal_id AND comp_id = #{compId} LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards c ON c.use_yn = 'Y' AND c.process_id in #{item} AND c.process_work_rev_no = #{revNo} AND c.comp_id = #{compId} AND c.write_year = #{writeYear} LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction f ON f.write_year = b.write_year AND f.doc_type = b.doc_type AND f.doc_no = b.doc_no AND f.doc_seq = b.doc_seq AND f.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction_hr g ON g.write_year = f.write_year AND g.doc_type = f.doc_type AND g.doc_no = f.doc_no AND g.doc_seq = f.doc_seq AND g.doc_seq_detail = f.doc_seq_detail LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info h ON h.hr_id = g.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards_factor_mgmt i ON i.factor_id = b.hazards_type AND i.class_id = b.hazards_classification LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file j ON j.target_type = 'RAP' AND j.target_id = CONCAT(f.write_year, f.doc_no, f.doc_seq, f.doc_seq_detail,'A') LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file k ON k.target_type = 'RAP' AND k.target_id = CONCAT(f.write_year, f.doc_no, f.doc_seq, f.doc_seq_detail,'B') LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_analysis n ON c.process_id = n.process_id and g.doc_seq = n.doc_seq left join esg.tb_process_work m on b.prcs_work_id = m.prcs_work_id left join esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_analysis o on b.process_id = o.process_id ORDER BY a.hazards_type ASC, b.doc_seq ASC, f.doc_seq_detail ASC, b.process_id ASC, m.work_content ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_1' THEN '기계적 요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_2' THEN '전기적 요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_3' THEN '화학(물질)적 요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_4' THEN '생물학적요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_5' THEN '작업특성 요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_6' THEN '작업환경 요인' END AS hazards_title, a.hazards_type, -- hazards_type에 따른 분류 정보 -- 요인 정보 'RAP' AS doc_type, b.doc_no, b.doc_seq, b.write_year AS plan_write_year, b.impl_write_year, b.impl_doc_no, b.impl_doc_seq, tlm.legal_id, tlm.legal_nm, b.process_id, o.process_nm, i.class_nm as implementationNm, b.hazards_classification AS impl_hazards_classification, b.hazards_cause, b.hazards_factor, b.related_evidence, b.use_yn AS impl_use_yn, coalesce(b.prcs_work_id, 0) AS prcs_work_id, m.work_content, b.frequency_score, b.impact_score, b.risk_score, b.after_frequency_score, b.after_impact_score, b.after_risk_score, b.current_safety_measures, b.created_at, rap.risk_assessment_standards, rap.risk_allowance_standards, -- 감소대책 정보 'RAP' as reduction_doc_type, f.doc_no, f.doc_seq, f.doc_seq_detail, f.reduction_measures, f.expected_date, f.completed_date, f.impl_content, f.use_yn AS reduction_use_yn, f.created_at AS redcution_created_at, -- 담당자 정보 g.doc_seq_detail2, g.hr_id, h.hr_nm, -- 감소대책 이미지 targetId j.file_id AS prevFileId, k.file_id AS afterFileId FROM ( SELECT hazards_type FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = 'RAP' AND doc_no = #{docNo} UNION SELECT b.hazards_type FROM ESG.tb_classification_hazards a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards_detail b ON a.write_year = b.write_year AND a.doc_type = b.doc_type AND a.doc_no = b.doc_no -- 위험성평가 계획과 연결하여 revNo 가져오기 INNER JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan rap ON rap.write_year = #{writeYear} AND rap.doc_type = 'RAP' AND rap.doc_no = #{docNo} INNER JOIN esg.tb_process_work_cnfm pwc ON pwc.process_id = a.process_id AND pwc.cnfm_yn = 'Y' WHERE a.use_yn = 'Y' AND a.process_work_rev_no = pwc.rev_no AND a.comp_id = #{compId} AND a.write_year = #{writeYear} ) a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation b ON b.hazards_type = a.hazards_type AND b.write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = 'RAP' AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND b.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_legal_manage tlm ON b.legal_id = tlm.legal_id AND comp_id = #{compId} -- 위험성평가 계획 테이블 조인 INNER JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan rap ON rap.write_year = b.write_year AND rap.doc_type = b.doc_type AND rap.doc_no = b.doc_no -- 공정 작업 확정 테이블 조인하여 revNo 가져오기 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_process_work_cnfm pwc ON pwc.process_id = b.process_id AND pwc.cnfm_yn = 'Y' -- 공정 작업 테이블 조인 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_process_work m ON m.prcs_work_id = b.prcs_work_id AND m.prcs_cnfm_id = pwc.prcs_cnfm_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards c ON c.use_yn = 'Y' AND c.process_work_rev_no = pwc.rev_no AND c.comp_id = #{compId} AND c.write_year = #{writeYear} LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction f ON f.write_year = b.write_year AND f.doc_type = b.doc_type AND f.doc_no = b.doc_no AND f.doc_seq = b.doc_seq AND f.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction_hr g ON g.write_year = f.write_year AND g.doc_type = f.doc_type AND g.doc_no = f.doc_no AND g.doc_seq = f.doc_seq AND g.doc_seq_detail = f.doc_seq_detail LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info h ON h.hr_id = g.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards_factor_mgmt i ON i.factor_id = b.hazards_type AND i.class_id = b.hazards_classification LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file j ON j.target_type = 'RAP' AND j.target_id = CONCAT(f.write_year, f.doc_no, f.doc_seq, f.doc_seq_detail,'A') LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file k ON k.target_type = 'RAP' AND k.target_id = CONCAT(f.write_year, f.doc_no, f.doc_seq, f.doc_seq_detail,'B') LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_analysis n ON c.process_id = n.process_id and g.doc_seq = n.doc_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_analysis o ON b.process_id = o.process_id ORDER BY a.hazards_type ASC, b.doc_seq ASC, f.doc_seq_detail ASC, b.process_id ASC, m.work_content ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_1' THEN '기계적 요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_2' THEN '전기적 요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_3' THEN '화학(물질)적 요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_4' THEN '생물학적요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_5' THEN '작업특성 요인' WHEN a.hazards_type = 'factor_6' THEN '작업환경 요인' END AS hazards_title, a.hazards_type, j.plan_nm, j.risk_assessment_standards, d.hazards_classification, -- hazards_type에 따른 분류 정보 -- 요인 정보 'RAP' AS doc_type, b.doc_no, b.doc_seq, b.write_year, i.class_nm, b.hazards_classification AS impl_hazards_classification, b.hazards_cause, b.hazards_factor, b.related_evidence, b.use_yn AS impl_use_yn, b.process_id, coalesce(b.prcs_work_id, 0) AS prcs_work_id, d1.minor_nm as frequency_score, d2.minor_nm as impact_score, d3.minor_nm as risk_score, b.current_safety_measures, b.created_at, d4.minor_nm as after_frequency_score, d5.minor_nm as after_impact_score, d6.minor_nm as after_risk_score, -- 감소대책 정보 'RAP' as reduction_doc_type, CASE WHEN f.DOC_SEQ_DETAIL is null then null ELSE (DENSE_RANK() OVER ( PARTITION BY c.doc_no, d.doc_seq ORDER BY d.write_year, e.class_id DESC, f.doc_seq_detail )) END AS resultCnt, f.doc_no, f.doc_seq, f.doc_seq_detail, f.reduction_measures, f.expected_date, f.completed_date, f.impl_content, f.use_yn AS reduction_use_yn, f.created_at AS redcution_created_at, -- 담당자 정보 g.doc_seq_detail2, g.hr_id, h.hr_nm FROM ( SELECT hazards_type FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = 'RAP' AND doc_no = #{docNo} UNION SELECT b.hazards_type FROM ESG.tb_classification_hazards a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards_detail b ON a.write_year = b.write_year AND a.doc_type = b.doc_type AND a.doc_no = b.doc_no WHERE a.use_yn = 'Y' AND a.process_id = #{processId} AND a.process_work_rev_no = #{revNo} AND a.comp_id = #{compId} AND a.write_year = #{writeYear} ) a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation b ON b.hazards_type = a.hazards_type AND write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = 'RAP' AND doc_no = #{docNo} LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards c ON c.use_yn = 'Y' AND c.process_id = #{processId} AND c.write_year = #{writeYear} LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards_detail d ON d.write_year = c.write_year AND d.doc_type = c.doc_type AND d.doc_no = c.doc_no AND d.hazards_type = a.hazards_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards_factor_mgmt e ON e.factor_id = d.hazards_type AND e.class_id = d.hazards_classification LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction f ON f.write_year = b.write_year AND f.doc_type = b.doc_type AND f.doc_no = b.doc_no AND f.doc_seq = b.doc_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction_hr g ON g.write_year = f.write_year AND g.doc_type = f.doc_type AND g.doc_no = f.doc_no AND g.doc_seq = f.doc_seq AND g.doc_seq_detail = f.doc_seq_detail LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info h ON h.hr_id = g.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards_factor_mgmt i ON i.factor_id = b.hazards_type AND i.class_id = b.hazards_classification LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan j ON j.doc_no = #{docNo} AND j.write_year = #{writeYear} AND j.comp_id = #{compId} LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d d1 ON d1.major_cd = 'C0038' AND d1.minor_cd = b.frequency_score LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d d2 ON d2.major_cd = 'C0039' AND d2.minor_cd = b.impact_score LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d d3 ON d3.major_cd = 'C0040' AND d3.minor_cd = b.risk_score LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d d4 ON d4.major_cd = 'C0038' AND d4.minor_cd = b.after_frequency_score LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d d5 ON d5.major_cd = 'C0039' AND d5.minor_cd = b.after_impact_score LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d d6 ON d6.major_cd = 'C0040' AND d6.minor_cd = b.after_risk_score ORDER BY a.hazards_type ASC, e.class_id DESC, b.doc_seq ASC, f.doc_seq_detail ASC
SELECT file_id FROM esg.tb_sys_file f WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND target_type = #{docType} AND target_id like CONCAT(#{searchText}, '%') AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY file_seq ASC

SELECT curr.process_nm, curr.work_content, curr.process_id, COUNT(rai.doc_seq) as risk_impl_remove_count FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT c.process_id, e.prcs_work_id, c.process_nm, e.work_content FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan rap JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds b ON b.write_year = rap.cpem_write_year AND b.doc_no = rap.cpem_doc_no AND b.comp_id = rap.comp_id AND b.use_yn = 'Y' AND b.orgn_id = #{orgnId} JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_analysis c ON c.write_year = b.write_year AND c.doc_type = b.doc_type AND c.doc_no = b.doc_no JOIN esg.tb_process_work_cnfm d ON d.rev_no = c.rev_no AND d.cnfm_yn = 'Y' AND d.process_id = c.process_id JOIN esg.tb_process_work e ON e.prcs_cnfm_id = d.prcs_cnfm_id WHERE rap.write_year = #{writeYear} AND rap.doc_no = #{docNo} AND rap.comp_id = #{compId} AND rap.doc_type = #{docType} ) curr LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT c.process_id, e.prcs_work_id FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan rap JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds b ON b.comp_id = rap.comp_id AND b.confirm_yn = 'Y' AND b.use_yn = 'Y' AND b.orgn_id = #{orgnId} JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_analysis c ON c.write_year = b.write_year AND c.doc_type = b.doc_type AND c.doc_no = b.doc_no JOIN esg.tb_process_work_cnfm d ON d.rev_no = c.rev_no AND d.cnfm_yn = 'Y' AND d.process_id = c.process_id JOIN esg.tb_process_work e ON e.prcs_cnfm_id = d.prcs_cnfm_id WHERE rap.write_year = #{writeYear} AND rap.doc_no = #{docNo} AND rap.comp_id = #{compId} AND rap.doc_type = #{docType} ) conf ON curr.process_id = conf.process_id AND curr.prcs_work_id = conf.prcs_work_id JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation rai ON rai.write_year = #{writeYear} AND rai.doc_no = #{docNo} AND rai.doc_type = #{docType} AND rai.prcs_work_id = curr.prcs_work_id AND rai.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE conf.process_id IS NULL GROUP BY curr.process_nm, curr.work_content, curr.process_id, curr.prcs_work_id ORDER BY curr.process_id, curr.prcs_work_id, curr.process_nm;

insert.if: INSERT INTO ESG.TB_RISK_ASSESSMENT_IMPLEMENTATION ( WRITE_YEAR, DOC_TYPE, DOC_NO, DOC_SEQ, HAZARDS_CLASSIFICATION, HAZARDS_CAUSE, HAZARDS_FACTOR, LEGAL_ID, RELATED_EVIDENCE, FREQUENCY_SCORE, IMPACT_SCORE, RISK_SCORE, USE_YN, HAZARDS_TYPE, PROCESS_ID, PRCS_WORK_ID, CURRENT_SAFETY_MEASURES, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, IMPL_WRITE_YEAR, IMPL_DOC_NO, IMPL_DOC_SEQ, AFTER_FREQUENCY_SCORE, AFTER_IMPACT_SCORE, AFTER_RISK_SCORE ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{hazardsClassification}, #{hazardsCause}, #{hazardsFactor}, #{legalId}, #{relatedEvidence}, #{frequencyScore}, #{impactScore}, #{riskScore}, #{useYn}, #{hazardsType}, #{processId}, #{prcsWorkId}, #{currentSafetyMeasures}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, #{implWriteYear}, #{implDocNo}, #{implDocSeq}, #{afterFrequencyScore}, #{afterImpactScore}, #{afterRiskScore} ) ON CONFLICT (WRITE_YEAR, DOC_TYPE, DOC_NO, DOC_SEQ) DO UPDATE SET HAZARDS_CLASSIFICATION = #{hazardsClassification}, HAZARDS_CAUSE = #{hazardsCause}, HAZARDS_FACTOR = #{hazardsFactor}, LEGAL_ID = #{legalId}, RELATED_EVIDENCE = #{relatedEvidence}, FREQUENCY_SCORE = #{frequencyScore}, IMPACT_SCORE = #{impactScore}, RISK_SCORE = #{riskScore}, AFTER_FREQUENCY_SCORE = #{afterFrequencyScore}, AFTER_IMPACT_SCORE = #{afterImpactScore}, AFTER_RISK_SCORE = #{afterRiskScore}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, HAZARDS_TYPE = #{hazardsType}, PROCESS_ID = #{processId}, PRCS_WORK_ID = #{prcsWorkId}, CURRENT_SAFETY_MEASURES = #{currentSafetyMeasures}, UPDATED_AT = NOW(), UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy}

mapper.insert:
SELECT coalesce(#{docSeqDetail}, LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_seq_detail::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0')) AS docSeqDetail FROM ESG.TB_RISK_ASSESSMENT_IMPLEMENTATION_REDUCTION WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_seq = #{docSeq}
INSERT INTO ESG.TB_RISK_ASSESSMENT_IMPLEMENTATION_REDUCTION ( WRITE_YEAR, DOC_TYPE, DOC_NO, DOC_SEQ, DOC_SEQ_DETAIL, REDUCTION_MEASURES, EXPECTED_DATE, COMPLETED_DATE, IMPL_CONTENT, USE_YN, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{docSeqDetail}, #{reductionMeasures}, #{expectedDate}, #{completedDate}, #{implContent}, #{useYn}, NOW(), #{createdBy} ) ON CONFLICT (WRITE_YEAR, DOC_TYPE, DOC_NO, DOC_SEQ, DOC_SEQ_DETAIL) DO UPDATE SET REDUCTION_MEASURES = #{reductionMeasures}, EXPECTED_DATE = #{expectedDate}, COMPLETED_DATE = #{completedDate}, IMPL_CONTENT = #{implContent}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, UPDATED_AT = NOW(), UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy}
